Orion's deal team has been granted data room access. The following ICS-related facts have been identified:

advanced/practice/module-8.description: Recall from the Apex Federal Systems case study: Apex has two divisions and a home office. Home office costs are $6.2M. The three-factor data produces a 62%/38% split (Division 1 / Division 2).

beginner/practice/module-1.title: Beginner Module 1 Practice: What Is an Incurred Cost Submission?
beginner/practice/module-1.description: Your colleague hands you a government contract and says, "We're required to file an ICS for this contract every year." You want to verify that claim by finding the clause that creates the obligation.

beginner/practice/module-2.title: Beginner Module 2 Practice: Who Must File and When
beginner/practice/module-2.description: Meridian Systems has four active government contracts during its fiscal year (October 1, 2024 – September 30, 2025):

beginner/practice/module-3.title: Beginner Module 3 Practice: Provisional vs. Final Rates
beginner/practice/module-3.description: Cascade Analytics closed its fiscal year and gathered the following actual cost data for its three indirect pools:

beginner/practice/module-4.title: Beginner Module 4 Practice: The Six Core Schedules
beginner/practice/module-4.description: Vertex Defense Solutions is assembling its ICS package. The accounting team has gathered the following pieces of information and needs to know which schedule each item belongs to.

beginner/practice/module-5.title: Beginner Module 5 Practice: Direct vs. Indirect Costs in ICS
beginner/practice/module-5.description: Orion Federal Services has the following costs for the fiscal year. Classify each as direct or indirect, identify which indirect pool it belongs to (if indirect), and note whether any allowability issues exist.

beginner/practice/module-6.title: Beginner Module 6 Practice: Reconciling Claimed vs. Billed Costs
beginner/practice/module-6.description: Pinnacle Defense Consulting has three active cost-type contracts. The ICS is complete and final indirect rates have been established. Here is the data for each contract:

beginner/practice/module-7.title: Beginner Module 7 Practice: DCAA and the ICS
beginner/practice/module-7.description: Longbow Systems submitted its ICS on June 25. Ten days later, DCAA sends a written deficiency notice identifying three issues: (1) Schedule H is signed by the VP of Sales, not an officer with financial authority; (2) The G&A pool total on Schedule A does not match the sum of line items on Schedule B; (3) Schedule F is missing entirely, though Longbow had two subcontractors during the year.

beginner/practice/module-8.title: Beginner Module 8 Practice: Beginner End-to-End Scenario
beginner/practice/module-8.description: Recall NovaTech Solutions from Module 8: a small 8(a) IT contractor with three active government contracts totaling approximately $1.8M in contract revenue for fiscal year 2024 (January 1 – December 31, 2024). The contracts include a CPFF task order with the Army, a T&M contract with DHS, and a CPFF contract with HHS.
